tasks.description: Fix PDF Cost Summary to include tool costs in step/section/workspace totals. Add stepTools field to ExportPdfOptions, pass step-tool associations from canvas-view.tsx, and sum tool cost_per_month into computeStepMonthlyCost().
acceptance_criteria: ExportPdfOptions interface has an optional stepTools field typed as an array of { step_id: string; tool: { cost_per_month: number | null } }
computeStepMonthlyCost() sums tool cost_per_month values for the step in addition to labor cost
canvas-view.tsx handleEnhancedExportPdf fetches stepTools (via fetchStepToolsByStep or batch) and passes them to createWorkspacePdf when config.costAnalysis is enabled
PDF Cost Summary section totals now include tool costs (step total = labor + tool monthly cost)
Section rollup totals include tool costs
Workspace total cost includes tool costs
Steps with zero labor cost but non-zero tool cost still appear in cost table
TypeScript compiles with zero errors (npx tsc --noEmit)

similar_files: src/components/panels/step-detail-panel.tsx lines 500-520 — UI combined cost calculation pattern
patterns_to_follow: step-detail-panel.tsx: stepTools.reduce((sum, st) => sum + (st.tool.cost_per_month ?? 0), 0) — same pattern for tool cost aggregation
fetchStepToolsByStep(stepId) in client.ts returns StepToolWithTool[] with tool.cost_per_month
ExportPdfOptions already has optional stepRoles — follow same pattern for stepTools
learnings_relevant: apiFetch unwraps envelope — fetchStepToolsByStep returns StepToolWithTool[] directly
BUG-035: step-tools API returns 500 when migration 024 not pushed — but code should still compile and work structurally

tasks.special_instructions: The step-tools API may return 500 if migration 024 isn't pushed (BUG-035). The fix is still correct structurally — it handles empty/failed fetch gracefully. Use the existing StepToolWithTool type from database.ts. For batch fetching all step tools, consider fetching once for all steps in the workspace (similar to how stepRoles are fetched) rather than N+1 per-step fetches. Check if a workspace-level step-tools endpoint exists; if not, fetch per-step or add a simple loop. The cost filter condition in the Cost Summary (totalMonthlyHours > 0 || totalMonthlyCost > 0) should naturally include tool-only costs now.

tasks.description: Add empty state guidance to tools canvas when no tools exist. Show centered prompt like 'Add your first tool to start tracking your tech stack' with a pointer to the toolbar Add button.
acceptance_criteria: When tools array is empty, a centered empty state message is visible on the tools canvas
Message text guides user to add their first tool
Message disappears when tools are added
Styling follows dark theme conventions (text-white/55 or text-white/30 for secondary text)

patterns_to_follow: Dark theme empty state: centered div with text-white/55 heading, text-white/30 body

tasks.special_instructions: Simple overlay or conditional render. Check how the existing canvas-view.tsx handles empty state for reference.

tasks.description: Add tooltips to disabled export dialog sections explaining what data is needed to enable them (e.g., 'Requires journey tab', 'Requires improvement ideas').
acceptance_criteria: Disabled checkboxes in export dialog show a tooltip on hover explaining the prerequisite
Tooltip text is contextual per section (e.g., 'Add a journey tab to enable' for journey sections)
Tooltips only appear on disabled sections, not enabled ones
Uses Radix Tooltip or native title attribute (match existing pattern)

patterns_to_follow: Radix Tooltip already imported in other components — check if available in export-pdf-dialog.tsx

tasks.special_instructions: SECTION_GROUPS has an 'available' field per section and a 'disabledReason' or similar could be added. Simplest approach: add a 'disabledTooltip' string to each section group item, then render as title attribute on the label when disabled. Radix Tooltip is fine too if already used in the file.

shared_files.note: No shared file modifications needed. database.ts types and client.ts functions are read-only references.

testing_plan.regression_reason: Last regression was iteration 128 (1 iteration ago). BUG-042 fix is contained to PDF export logic. No regression needed this iteration.
